block_00: Take a look at the top news of the week
block_03: Meta Platforms, formerly known as Facebook, has recently acquired blockchain company Chain, as part of its ongoing efforts to improve efficiency and streamline operations. The move comes amidst reports of layoffs at Meta's engineering team, as the company continues to restructure its workforce to better align with its new metaverse-focused strategy. The acquisition of Chain could potentially help Meta to achieve its long-term vision of creating a decentralized and secure virtual world for its users.
block_07: AMD stock surges on bullish profit estimates and strong demand for its high-performance computing products. Investors bet on the chipmaker's continued success in the tech industry. The share price rose by 11% this week.
block_10: AMC Entertainment shares slide as investors take profits amid concerns over the stock's valuation and the sustainability of the meme stock frenzy. The movie theater chain's plans to capitalize on the streaming trend also come under scrutiny – the share price has fallen by 22% in one week.
